rulings.Case Title: CUONG VAN TRAN VS. RAMON PARAS-NISCE ET AL

rulings.Case Title: MELANIE LARKIN ET AL VS. MOHAMED MARLEEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 15, 2019 line 4. PLAINTIFFs MELANIE LARKIN and RICHARD SMITH's Motion To Compel Arbitration GRANTED. Mr. Marleen, as the sole owner of the signatory corporation, is bound by the arbitration agreement and this action shall proceed to arbitration forthwith. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MELANIE LARKIN ET AL VS. MOHAMED MARLEEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For A Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 15, 2019 line 4. PLAINTIFFs MELANIE LARKIN and RICHARD SMITH's Motion For A Preliminary Injunction Hearing Required. Motion for Preliminary Injunction is DENIED. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that preliminary injunction is a proper relief for Plaintiff to secure future collection on the judgment. Specifically, there are no cases cited factually similar to the case at bar, i.e. that a preliminary injunction may be issued to prevent the sale of an unrelated property in order to ensure that the defendant has assets at the conclusion of litigation. Additionally, pursuant to Cal. Code Jud. Ethics Canon 3D(2) and Cal. Judicial Conduct Handbook 5:67 the Court may be compelled to refer this matter (e-mail) to the State Bar re: Code of Professional Conduct Rule 4.4. = (501/CFH)
